We offer craft classes and sell unique handmade gift items, original art and a range of colourful yarns perfect for knitting and crochet projects. Heart of Handmade is a must-see place to visit in Barnsley.

Book a Workshop Online shop coming soon

Workshops

Come and learn a new craft, or master an old one! We have regular workshops run by some of our talented makers.

There's plenty on offer, from crochet and sewing to wax painting, ceramics and fused glass making.

View Workshops

Shop

Stocking items from more than 30 different makers, we offer something for everyone.

Pick up some original art, handmade jewellery or unique gifts for those special occasions.

Come Visit Us

Sell

We're always happy to welcome new artists and makers, so if you're looking for a place to stock and sell your work then contact us for an information pack.

Get in Touch

We can now take bookings for private craft parties.
Get in touch to find out more!

Opening times

Tuesday09:30 – 16:00
Wednesday09:30 – 16:00
Thursday09:30 – 18:00
Friday09:30 – 16:00
Saturday09:00 – 16:00

Closed Monday & Sunday  •  Thursday closes at 4pm during school holidays  •  Sunday available for workshops
